trains.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 22 to 28 minutes to Central station off-peak.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Hemmant via Wynnum Road and New Cleveland Road.

driving.motorway_access: Direct Gateway Motorway access. Port of Brisbane corridor for industrial routes.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 18 to 22 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Wynnum Creek parkland and walking tracks

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Hemmant itself has limited retail. Wynnum and Manly village strips are within a short drive for cafes, dining, and weekend markets. The Cannon Hill K-Mart Plaza is accessible via Wynnum Road.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along the suburb's northern boundary.

pockets.name: Riverside
pockets.character: Streets closest to the Brisbane River. Open-space access and a relaxed riverside feel.

pockets.name: Central residential
pockets.character: Established residential streets with character and post-war stock.

pockets.name: Industrial-adjacent
pockets.character: Streets bordering the Port of Brisbane corridor. Market prices the industrial adjacency accurately.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers extending the Murarrie and Tingalpa value story further along the corridor.
Hemmant is one of the most accessible entry points along the Cleveland line corridor.
Train station and motorway access combined with a lower entry price support yield-focused investor buyers.
